message:
refactor(mcp): update client module doc comment and enrich framework seam roundtrip test

- mcp_client.rs: update module doc comment to reflect new architecture
  ("framework-backed outbound MCP client surface" replaces "minimal
  abstraction over fastmcp client APIs")
- mcp_framework.rs: enrich tool_definition_roundtrips test with non-trivial
  icon and annotations payloads to verify the full serialization path,
  including the is_destructive() annotation accessor

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
